variants: Yevgeniy Tsaplin hails from the serene town of Pebblefin Creek, where he developed a passion for creativity from a young age. In recognition of his contributions, Yevgeniy received the prestigious Mirage Branch Medallion. He is also an active member of the Basilisk Mask Crafters, where he shares his skills with fellow enthusiasts.
